findings: SP 500-306 identifies a NIST Downsampler and says it was released as part of NBIS.
The current official NIGOS page exposes NBIS 5.0.0 as the newest stable release.
The official NBIS 5.0.0 source tree and changelog contain no identified SP 500-289 downsampler artifact.
No versioned source, binary, archive, or synthetic-input interface for the NIST Downsampler was found on current official NIST pages.
official_publisher: National Institute of Standards and Technology
relationship_to_guidance: SP 500-306 states that the NIST Downsampler was used to generate the reference outputs for supplier evaluation.
search_scope: Official NIGOS release index and changelog
Official NIST publication and fingerprint-compression pages
